name: Collegiate Crowns
description: The Collegiate Crowns were a mostly black Bronx gang that was part of 'Crown nation,' a confederation of several Bronx gangs with the word 'Crowns' in their name. The two main Crown gangs in the nation were the Egyptian Crowns and the Valiant Crowns. A 1957 newspaper article documented a feud between the Collegiate Crowns and the Sportsmen that resulted in shootings.
